texto: I've never believed much in that holding hands kind of love. I've always thought that love is about two different personalities trying to confront life, trying to make sense of their responsibilities, to themselves, to each other, and to the wider society.
explicacao: Citação de Alan Bates sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I've never believed much in that holding hands kind of love. I've always thought that love is abo…” articula vida, love, love-is em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como vida e love-is.
